posts.hook: My friend dragged me here thinking it was 'just another art thing'
slides: My friend dragged me here thinking it was 'just another art thing'
Then I walked into a room where Starry Night wrapped around me like a living dream
Sunflowers bloomed across the floor beneath my feet
I stood inside brushstrokes 20 feet tall, watching colors dance to classical music
Get your tickets before this sells out. Trust me on this one. 🎫
posts.caption:
Sometimes the best experiences are the ones you never saw coming.

Imagine Van Gogh isn't just looking at art — it's stepping inside it. 200+ masterpieces projected at massive scale. Classical music. Pure magic.

Tickets selling fast. Link in bio.

posts.hook: Quiz: Can you handle 40 minutes of pure beauty?
posts.content:
Quiz: Rate your art tolerance
🎨 I cry at sunsets: READY
🎨 I take 47 photos of my coffee: READY  
🎨 I screenshot pretty Instagram posts: READY

All 3? Imagine Van Gogh will destroy you (in the best way)

posts.hook: Wait for it... this is what $30 gets you
posts.content: Start showing $30 cash. Text: 'What $30 gets you these days.' Show disappointing things: small coffee, parking, etc. Then: 'OR...' Massive reveal of full Imagine Van Gogh experience. 40 minutes inside masterpieces. Classical music. Pure magic. Text: 'Choose wisely.' End with ticket link.
posts.visual_direction: Value comparison format. Build up disappointment then massive payoff. Show the full experience in all its glory. Make $30 feel like stealing
